steps: File French tax reclaim using Form 5001 with BNP Paribas for EUR 3,744.00 overpaid WHT on TotalEnergies SE
Submit proof of Norwegian tax residency and FR-NO treaty entitlement to 15% rate vs. 30% standard rate applied
Provide custodian statement showing gross EUR 249,600 and excessive tax EUR 33,696 vs. correct EUR 29,952
Follow up with French tax authorities within 3-year statute of limitations for dividend WHT refunds

references.title: impots.gouv.fr – Form 5001 (Reimbursement of WHT on Dividends)
